rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GUADALUPE OCHOA
rulings.Calendar Matter: For Reconsideration Of Order Determining Distribution Rights
rulings.Rulings: The motion for reconsideration is denied. The objectors failed to meet the statutory requirements of CCP Section 1008(a). Specifically, they failed to show the existence of new or different facts, law, or circumstances justifying reconsideration of the Court's June 2, 2016 Order Determining Distribution Rights. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 9/6/2016.
